ocr_findings.description: The ジョイントベンチャー comparison diagram (強い←→弱い, M&A / ジョイントベンチャー / アライアンス) is represented as an image placeholder rather than structured text. However the surrounding prose fully conveys the concept, so content loss is minimal.
Furigana エムアンドエー above M&A not captured; cosmetic only.
OCR renders '&' for '&' throughout (HTML entity artifact). Cosmetic.

reviewer_notes: M&A, アライアンス, ジョイントベンチャー sections all accurately transcribed. The comparison table/diagram is replaced by image placeholder but its textual description is intact. No high or med severity issues.
